title: Aluminium Foil Blackout Window Film Privacy Film for Glass Windows, Heat Reflective Thermal Insulation Sun Blocking Cover, Anti UV No Drill Window Blinds for Home Bedroom(Black Edge,50cm x 50cm)
features: Noise Reduction & Durable: Made of robust aluminum foil and thickened cotton, this heavy-duty window covering helps absorb outside noise It withstands harsh weather and will not easily deform
Blackout & Privacy: Window privacy film blocks harsh sunlight and UV rays It provides excellent two-way privacy day and night, making it perfect for bedrooms and daytime sleepers
Heat Control & Thermal Insulation: Double-sided aluminum foil window tint reflects sun glare, keeping your room cool in summer and warm in winter It effectively blocks out harsh heat all year
Easy Suction Cup Install: No glue needed! This alternative to static cling uses strong suction cups for a fast, tool-free setup It leaves no sticky residue, making it highly renter friendly
Versatile Sun Blocker: Ideal for glass windows, skylights, garages, or balconies You can even wrap pipes to prevent winter freezing A reusable, multi-purpose solution for everyday home needs
description: Item Name: Blackout Window Film / Aluminum Foil Window Shade Material: Double-sided Aluminum Foil + Thickened Cotton Core Color: Silver Size: Width x Height (Available in multiple sizes) Thickness: 9 mm Installation Type: Suction Cups (No glue required) Key Features: Heat Insulation / Sun Blocking / Room Darkening / Waterproof / Noise Reduction Package Includes: 1 x Aluminum Foil Window Film / 4 x Suction Cups Warm Tips: Size Tolerance: As the window film is manually cut and finished, please allow a slight size variation of 1-2 cm (0.4-0.8 inches). Suction Cup Care: Due to packaging and transit, the suction cups may experience slight deformation. Simply soak them in warm water for a few minutes before installation to restore their shape and ensure a stronger, more secure grip on the glass.
